---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] <Short description>"
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🧐 Problem Description
**A clear and concise description of what the bug is.**
(e.g., "The application crashes when I click the 'Feed' button after 10 PM.")

## 🛠 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant terminal logs/console output here.

## 💻 Environment Information
- **OS:** [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- **Version:** [e.g. v1.2.3 or commit hash]
- **Browser (if applicable):** [e.g. Chrome 122]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
